## TRM1.4. Vertical flight efficiency of the descent (PI#7)

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (149.2 seconds per flight), average times flown level during descent are on average 46.7 seconds per flight lower in Romania. The highest average time flown level during descent happens at Mihail Kogalniceanu Constanta (LRCK) (270.9 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Iasi (LRIA) (46.6 seconds per flight).
